EmailNotificationSettings.Subject: Your password has been changed
EmailNotificationSettings.BodyTemplate:
Hello {Username},

Your password was changed successfully on {Timestamp} from IP address {IpAddress}.

If you did not make this change, contact IT Support immediately.

ChangePasswordForm.HelpText: If you are having trouble with this tool, please contact IT Support.

ErrorsPasswordForm.UsernameEmailPattern: Please enter a valid email address.

Alerts.SuccessAlertBody: Please note it may take a few minutes for your new password to reach all domain controllers.
Alerts.ErrorPasswordChangeNotAllowed: You are not allowed to change your password. Please contact IT Support.
Alerts.ErrorInvalidDomain: Invalid domain. Please check your username and try again.
Alerts.ErrorCaptcha: Could not verify you are not a robot. Please try again.
Alerts.ErrorFieldRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
Alerts.ErrorFieldMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
Alerts.ErrorComplexPassword: The new password does not meet complexity requirements.
Alerts.ErrorConnectionLdap: Could not connect to the directory. Please contact IT Support.
Alerts.ErrorScorePassword: The password is not strong enough. Please choose a stronger password.
Alerts.ErrorDistancePassword: The new password is too similar to your current password.
Alerts.ErrorPwnedPassword: This password has been found in public breach databases. Please choose a different password.
Alerts.ErrorPasswordTooYoung: Your password was changed too recently. Please wait before changing it again.
Alerts.ErrorRateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Alerts.ErrorPwnedPasswordCheckFailed: The password breach check service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
Alerts.ErrorPortalLockout: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 30 minutes before trying again.
Alerts.ErrorApproachingLockout: Incorrect password. Warning: one more failed attempt will temporarily lock your access to this portal.
Alerts.ErrorPasswordTooRecentlyChanged: Your password was changed too recently. The domain requires a minimum wait time before you can change it again. Please try later or contact IT Support.
